title: Level 1 — Web Service
description: Launch a basic web service that can handle incoming user traffic. Place the right components to route requests and store data.
hint: Start with a web server to handle requests, then add a database to persist data.

demands.label: Web User
demands.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><circle cx="10" cy="6" r="3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" d="M4 18 C4 13 16 13 16 18"/></svg>

title: Level 2 — Web & Mobile
description: Your service is growing. Support both web and mobile clients by exposing dedicated endpoints for each platform.
hint: Mobile clients need an API Gateway to access backend services separately from the web frontend.

demands.label: Web User
demands.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><circle cx="10" cy="6" r="3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" d="M4 18 C4 13 16 13 16 18"/></svg>

demands.label: Mobile User
demands.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><rect x="6" y="1" width="8" height="14" rx="1.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="10" cy="13" r="0.75" fill="currentColor"/><line x1="8" y1="18" x2="12" y2="18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="10" y1="15" x2="10" y2="18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>

title: Level 3 — Under Attack
description: Traffic is surging and bad actors are probing your service. Secure your web frontend without breaking mobile access, and keep latency low.
hint: A WAF can filter malicious web traffic — place it between your users and the web server. Mobile traffic bypasses the WAF but still needs its own gateway.

demands.label: Web User
demands.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><circle cx="10" cy="6" r="3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" d="M4 18 C4 13 16 13 16 18"/></svg>

demands.label: Mobile User
demands.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><rect x="6" y="1" width="8" height="14" rx="1.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="10" cy="13" r="0.75" fill="currentColor"/><line x1="8" y1="18" x2="12" y2="18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="10" y1="15" x2="10" y2="18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>

WAF.label: Web Application Firewall
